objective: maximize causal signal filtering quality on deterministic non-stationary synthetic signals

process_verifiers.name: signal_processing_score
command: from evaluator import evaluate; import json; print(json.dumps(evaluate('initial_program.py'), sort_keys=True))

constraints.task_summary: Implement process_signal(input_signal, window_size) as a causal filter that returns len(input_signal)-window_size+1 values.
